channel.title: WinUI 3 on John's Music & Tech
channel.description: Recent content in WinUI 3 on John's Music & Tech

item.title: A 90s Visual C++ Developer’s Look At Modern Windows Development
item.description: A returning veteran developer takes an honest, outside-looking-in look at the ‘Great Fragmentation’ of modern Windows UI frameworks and the architectural tragedy of losing the universal window handle.
